---
title: "rna_seq_reworked_vff"
format: revealjs
editor: visual
---


## Code

```{r}
# Core packages
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggvenn)
library(pheatmap)
library(ComplexUpset)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(enrichplot)
library(ReactomePA)
library(msigdbr)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(readr)
library(AnnotationDbi)

organism_db <- org.Hs.eg.db
```

```{r}
#| label: setup-figure-saving
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  dev = c("png", "pdf"),
  fig.path = "figs/",
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 5,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

results_dir <- "Results_V2"
figures_dir <- "Figures_V2"

dir.create(results_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(figures_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# User-defined parameters.
p_thr <- 0.05
primary_l2fc_thr <- 0.585
upset_l2fc_thresholds <- c(1.5, 1, 0.585)
heatmap_l2fc_thr <- primary_l2fc_thr
include_broad_axon_guidance <- FALSE
```

```{r}
# Helper functions.
save_plot_all <- function(plot, name, width, height, units = "cm", dpi = 300, path = figures_dir) {
  stopifnot(inherits(plot, "ggplot"))

  dir.create(path, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

  base_file <- file.path(path, name)
  plot_no_legend <- plot + ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "none")

  ggplot2::ggsave(paste0(base_file, ".svg"), plot, width = width, height = height, units = units)
  ggplot2::ggsave(paste0(base_file, ".png"), plot, width = width, height = height, units = units, dpi = dpi, bg = "white")
  ggplot2::ggsave(paste0(base_file, "_no-legend.svg"), plot_no_legend, width = width, height = height, units = units)
  ggplot2::ggsave(paste0(base_file, "_no-legend.png"), plot_no_legend, width = width, height = height, units = units, dpi = dpi, bg = "white")

  invisible(NULL)
}

clean_numeric_columns <- function(df, cols) {
  df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      dplyr::across(
        dplyr::all_of(cols),
        ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(stringr::str_replace_all(as.character(.x), ",", ".")))
      )
    )
}

assert_required_columns <- function(df, cols, object_name = deparse(substitute(df))) {
  missing_cols <- setdiff(cols, colnames(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(
      paste0(
        "Missing required columns in ", object_name, ": ",
        paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")
      )
    )
  }
}

make_ranked_vector <- function(df, id_col, score_col, decreasing = TRUE) {
  out <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[id_col]]), !is.na(.data[[score_col]]), is.finite(.data[[score_col]])) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[id_col]]) %>%
    dplyr::slice_max(order_by = abs(.data[[score_col]]), n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  vec <- out[[score_col]]
  names(vec) <- out[[id_col]]
  sort(vec, decreasing = decreasing)
}

add_de_category <- function(df, p_thr = 0.05, l2fc_thr = 1) {
  df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      significant = is.finite(padj) & padj < p_thr,
      de_class = dplyr::case_when(
        significant & log2FoldChange >=  l2fc_thr ~ "Strong up",
        significant & log2FoldChange <= -l2fc_thr ~ "Strong down",
        significant                               ~ "Other sig",
        TRUE                                      ~ "Not sig"
      )
    )
}

export_enrichment_table <- function(x, filename, path = results_dir) {
  if (is.null(x)) return(invisible(NULL))
  if (!inherits(x, "enrichResult") && !inherits(x, "gseaResult")) return(invisible(NULL))
  if (is.null(x@result) || nrow(x@result) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))

  readr::write_csv(tibble::as_tibble(x@result), file.path(path, filename))
  invisible(NULL)
}

make_safe_filename <- function(x) {
  stringr::str_replace_all(x, "[^A-Za-z0-9_]+", "_")
}

plot_gsea_curve <- function(gsea_obj, pathway_id, pathway_desc, pathway_nes, pathway_padj, pathway_setsize) {
  enrichplot::gseaplot2(
    gsea_obj,
    geneSetID = pathway_id,
    title = pathway_desc
  ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      subtitle = paste0(
        "NES = ", round(pathway_nes, 3),
        " | padj = ", signif(pathway_padj, 3),
        " | set size = ", pathway_setsize
      )
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.subtitle = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10)
    )
}
```

```{r}
# Input files.
results_file <- "~/Bureau/Guillaume/SOUTH_ROCK/medullo_rnaseq/medullo_rnaseq_analysis/DESeq2_redo_clean_v2/DESeq2_results_with_counts.xlsx"
norm_counts_file <- "~/Téléchargements/normalized_matrix_006_STAU_B_140121_BATCH_CORRECTED.txt"
```

```{r}
# Main DESeq2 results.

data_raw <- readxl::read_excel(results_file, sheet = "ALL") %>%
  clean_numeric_columns(c("padj", "log2FoldChange", "FoldChange", "FoldChange_signed"))

assert_required_columns(data_raw, c("ensemblID", "padj", "log2FoldChange"), "data_raw")

data <- data_raw %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    symbol = dplyr::if_else(is.na(symbol) | symbol == "", ensemblID, as.character(symbol)),
    entrez = AnnotationDbi::mapIds(
      organism_db,
      keys = ensemblID,
      keytype = "ENSEMBL",
      column = "ENTREZID",
      multiVals = "first"
    )
  )

```

```{r}
# Derived tables reused by multiple analyses.
data_de <- data %>%
  add_de_category(p_thr = p_thr, l2fc_thr = primary_l2fc_thr)

sig_table <- data_de %>%
  dplyr::filter(significant, !is.na(entrez)) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(entrez, .keep_all = TRUE)

bg_entrez <- data_de %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(entrez)) %>%
  dplyr::pull(entrez) %>%
  unique()

up_entrez <- data_de %>%
  dplyr::filter(significant, log2FoldChange >= primary_l2fc_thr, !is.na(entrez)) %>%
  dplyr::pull(entrez) %>%
  unique()

down_entrez <- data_de %>%
  dplyr::filter(significant, log2FoldChange <= -primary_l2fc_thr, !is.na(entrez)) %>%
  dplyr::pull(entrez) %>%
  unique()

up_genes <- data_de %>%
  dplyr::filter(significant, log2FoldChange >= primary_l2fc_thr) %>%
  dplyr::pull(symbol) %>%
  unique()

down_genes <- data_de %>%
  dplyr::filter(significant, log2FoldChange <= -primary_l2fc_thr) %>%
  dplyr::pull(symbol) %>%
  unique()

up_ensembl <- data_de %>%
  dplyr::filter(significant, log2FoldChange >= primary_l2fc_thr) %>%
  dplyr::pull(ensemblID) %>%
  unique()

down_ensembl <- data_de %>%
  dplyr::filter(significant, log2FoldChange <= -primary_l2fc_thr) %>%
  dplyr::pull(ensemblID) %>%
  unique()

bg_ensembl <- data_de %>%
  dplyr::pull(ensemblID) %>%
  unique()

selected_ensembl <- data_de %>%
  dplyr::filter(significant, abs(log2FoldChange) >= heatmap_l2fc_thr) %>%
  dplyr::pull(ensemblID) %>%
  unique()

heatmap_matrix <- norm_counts_all[rownames(norm_counts_all) %in% selected_ensembl, , drop = FALSE]
```

## Differential expression summary

```{r}
cat(
  "Genes with |log2FC| >=", primary_l2fc_thr, "and padj <", p_thr, ":",
  sum(data_de$significant & abs(data_de$log2FoldChange) >= primary_l2fc_thr, na.rm = TRUE),
  "\n"
)
cat(
  "Genes with log2FC >=", primary_l2fc_thr, "and padj <", p_thr, ":",
  sum(data_de$log2FoldChange >= primary_l2fc_thr & data_de$significant, na.rm = TRUE),
  "\n"
)
cat(
  "Genes with log2FC <= -", primary_l2fc_thr, "and padj <", p_thr, ":",
  sum(data_de$log2FoldChange <= -primary_l2fc_thr & data_de$significant, na.rm = TRUE),
  "\n"
)
```

## Venn diagram

```{r}
venn_sets <- list(
  "Strongly decreased" = down_genes,
  "Strongly increased" = up_genes
)

p_venn <- ggvenn::ggvenn(
  venn_sets,
  show_elements = FALSE,
  set_name_size = 5,
  fill_color = c("#6a0f49", "#9ecae1")
) +
  ggplot2::ggtitle("Differentially expressed genes at the primary threshold")

save_plot_all(p_venn, "DeregulatedGenes", width = 8, height = 9, units = "cm")
```

## UpSet plots

```{r}
# UpSet plots restricted to significant genes and recomputed at multiple log2FC thresholds.
n_total_genes <- nrow(data_de)
n_sig_genes <- sum(data_de$significant, na.rm = TRUE)
sig_pct <- round(100 * n_sig_genes / n_total_genes, 1)

for (lfc_thr in upset_l2fc_thresholds) {
  df_sets_fc <- data_de %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      StrongUp = significant & log2FoldChange >= lfc_thr,
      StrongDown = significant & log2FoldChange <= -lfc_thr
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(significant) %>%
    dplyr::select(StrongUp, StrongDown)

  n_up_genes <- sum(df_sets_fc$StrongUp, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_down_genes <- sum(df_sets_fc$StrongDown, na.rm = TRUE)

  p_upset_fc <- ComplexUpset::upset(
    df_sets_fc,
    intersect = c("StrongUp", "StrongDown"),
    name = "genes",
    width_ratio = 0.15,
    set_sizes = FALSE
  ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = paste0("Intersection of strong DE classes (|log2FC| >= ", lfc_thr, ")"),
      subtitle = paste0(
        "Total genes tested: ", format(n_total_genes, big.mark = ","),
        " | Significant genes: ", format(n_sig_genes, big.mark = ","),
        " (", sig_pct, "%)",
        " | Upregulated: ", format(n_up_genes, big.mark = ","),
        " | Downregulated: ", format(n_down_genes, big.mark = ",")
      ),
      caption = "Strong classes are defined among significant genes using the selected log2FC threshold."
    )

  print(p_upset_fc)

  save_plot_all(
    p_upset_fc,
    paste0("ComplexUpSet_l2fc_", gsub("\\.", "_", as.character(lfc_thr))),
    width = 18,
    height = 10,
    units = "cm"
  )
}
```

## Heatmap

```{r}
if (nrow(heatmap_matrix) > 1) {
  pheatmap::pheatmap(
    heatmap_matrix,
    scale = "row",
    show_rownames = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    filename = file.path(figures_dir, "Heatmap.png")
  )

  pheatmap::pheatmap(
    heatmap_matrix,
    scale = "row",
    show_rownames = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    filename = file.path(figures_dir, "Heatmap.pdf")
  )

  pheatmap::pheatmap(
    heatmap_matrix,
    scale = "row",
    show_rownames = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    legend = FALSE,
    filename = file.path(figures_dir, "Heatmap_no-legend.png")
  )

  pheatmap::pheatmap(
    heatmap_matrix,
    scale = "row",
    show_rownames = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    legend = FALSE,
    filename = file.path(figures_dir, "Heatmap_no-legend.pdf")
  )
}
```

## Volcano plots

```{r}
volcano_labels <- data_de %>%
  dplyr::filter(de_class %in% c("Strong up", "Strong down")) %>%
  dplyr::slice_max(order_by = abs(log2FoldChange), n = 30, with_ties = FALSE)

volcano_palette <- c(
  "Strong up" = "gold",
  "Strong down" = "coral2",
  "Other sig" = "grey70",
  "Not sig" = "grey85"
)

yvals <- -log10(pmax(data_de$padj, 1e-300))
y_max <- max(yvals[is.finite(yvals)], na.rm = TRUE)

p_volcano <- ggplot2::ggplot(data_de, ggplot2::aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), fill = de_class)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(shape = 21, color = "white", size = 1.8, alpha = 0.8, stroke = 0.2) +
  ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
    data = volcano_labels,
    ggplot2::aes(label = symbol),
    size = 3.2,
    box.padding = 0.4,
    point.padding = 0.25,
    segment.size = 0.3,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    label.size = 0.15,
    seed = 123
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_thr), linetype = "dashed") +
  ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = c(-primary_l2fc_thr, primary_l2fc_thr), linetype = "dashed") +
  ggplot2::coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.6, y_max * 1.02), clip = "off") +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = volcano_palette, name = NULL) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = expression(Log[2] ~ "Fold Change"),
    y = expression(-Log[10] ~ "adjusted p-value"),
    title = "Volcano plot — differential expression"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(20, 24, 50, 24)
  )

save_plot_all(p_volcano, "Volcano_All", width = 32, height = 22, units = "cm")
```

## Volcano plot for selected genes

```{r}
interest_genes_axon <- c("PLXNA1", "PLXNA4", "CXCR4", "SEMA6B", "SEMA3B", "NRP2", "SEMA4B", "SEMA6C", "ROBO2")
interest_genes_g3 <- c("MYC", "JUN")

interest_df <- data_de %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    category = dplyr::case_when(
      symbol %in% interest_genes_axon ~ "Axon genes",
      symbol %in% interest_genes_g3 ~ "G3 genes",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

interest_palette <- c(
  "Axon genes" = "coral2",
  "G3 genes" = "gold",
  "Other" = "grey80"
)

interest_yvals <- -log10(pmax(interest_df$padj, 1e-300))
interest_ymax <- max(interest_yvals[is.finite(interest_yvals)], na.rm = TRUE)

p_volcano_interest <- ggplot2::ggplot(interest_df, ggplot2::aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), fill = category)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(shape = 21, color = "white", size = 1.6, alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0.2) +
  ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
    data = interest_df %>% dplyr::filter(category != "Other"),
    ggplot2::aes(label = symbol),
    size = 3.4,
    max.overlaps = 200,
    box.padding = 0.45,
    point.padding = 0.25,
    segment.size = 0.3,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    label.size = 0.15,
    seed = 42
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_thr), linetype = "dashed") +
  ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = c(-primary_l2fc_thr, primary_l2fc_thr), linetype = "dashed") +
  ggplot2::coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.6, interest_ymax * 1.02), clip = "off") +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = interest_palette, name = NULL) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = expression(Log[2] ~ "Fold Change"),
    y = expression(-Log[10] ~ "adjusted p-value"),
    title = "Volcano plot — selected axon and G3 genes"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(20, 24, 50, 24)
  )

save_plot_all(p_volcano_interest, "Volcano_Gene_Interests", width = 32, height = 22, units = "cm")
```

## ORA analyses

```{r}
ora_go_up <- clusterProfiler::enrichGO(
  gene = up_entrez,
  universe = bg_entrez,
  OrgDb = organism_db,
  keyType = "ENTREZID",
  readable = TRUE,
  ont = "BP",
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
  qvalueCutoff = 0.10,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH"
)

ora_go_down <- clusterProfiler::enrichGO(
  gene = down_entrez,
  universe = bg_entrez,
  OrgDb = organism_db,
  keyType = "ENTREZID",
  readable = TRUE,
  ont = "BP",
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
  qvalueCutoff = 0.10,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH"
)
```

```{r}
p_go_up_dot <- enrichplot::dotplot(ora_go_up, showCategory = 20) +
  ggplot2::ggtitle("Enriched GO biological processes — UP genes") +
  ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 11, lineheight = 1.15),
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
  )

p_go_down_dot <- enrichplot::dotplot(ora_go_down, showCategory = 20) +
  ggplot2::ggtitle("Enriched GO biological processes — DOWN genes") +
  ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 11, lineheight = 1.15),
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
  )

save_plot_all(p_go_up_dot, "GO_BP_UP_dotplot", width = 20, height = 25, units = "cm")
save_plot_all(p_go_down_dot, "GO_BP_DOWN_dotplot", width = 20, height = 25, units = "cm")

export_enrichment_table(ora_go_up, "GO_BP_UP_terms.csv")
export_enrichment_table(ora_go_down, "GO_BP_DOWN_terms.csv")
```

## Reactome ORA

```{r}
reactome_up <- ReactomePA::enrichPathway(
  gene = up_entrez,
  universe = bg_entrez,
  readable = TRUE,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH"
)

reactome_down <- ReactomePA::enrichPathway(
  gene = down_entrez,
  universe = bg_entrez,
  readable = TRUE,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH"
)
```

```{r}
p_reactome_up <- enrichplot::dotplot(reactome_up, showCategory = 20) +
  ggplot2::ggtitle("Reactome — enriched pathways in UP genes") +
  ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 11, lineheight = 1.15),
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
  )

p_reactome_down <- enrichplot::dotplot(reactome_down, showCategory = 20) +
  ggplot2::ggtitle("Reactome — enriched pathways in DOWN genes") +
  ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 11, lineheight = 1.15),
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
  )

save_plot_all(p_reactome_up, "Reactome_UP_dotplot", width = 20, height = 30, units = "cm")
save_plot_all(p_reactome_down, "Reactome_DOWN_dotplot", width = 20, height = 30, units = "cm")

export_enrichment_table(reactome_up, "Reactome_ORA_UP_terms.csv")
export_enrichment_table(reactome_down, "Reactome_ORA_DOWN_terms.csv")
```

## MSigDB C6 ORA

```{r}
c6_msigdb <- msigdbr::msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", category = "C6") %>%
  dplyr::select(gs_name, gene_symbol)

all_de_symbols <- data_de %>%
  dplyr::filter(significant) %>%
  dplyr::pull(symbol) %>%
  unique()

ora_c6_up <- clusterProfiler::enricher(up_genes, TERM2GENE = c6_msigdb, pvalueCutoff = 0.05)
ora_c6_down <- clusterProfiler::enricher(down_genes, TERM2GENE = c6_msigdb, pvalueCutoff = 0.05)
ora_c6_all <- clusterProfiler::enricher(all_de_symbols, TERM2GENE = c6_msigdb, pvalueCutoff = 0.05)
```

```{r}
p_c6_up <- enrichplot::dotplot(ora_c6_up, showCategory = 20) + ggplot2::ggtitle("MSigDB C6 — UP genes")
p_c6_down <- enrichplot::dotplot(ora_c6_down, showCategory = 20) + ggplot2::ggtitle("MSigDB C6 — DOWN genes")
p_c6_all <- enrichplot::dotplot(ora_c6_all, showCategory = 20) + ggplot2::ggtitle("MSigDB C6 — all significant genes")

save_plot_all(p_c6_up, "MSigDB_C6_UP_dotplot", width = 18, height = 14, units = "cm")
save_plot_all(p_c6_down, "MSigDB_C6_DOWN_dotplot", width = 18, height = 14, units = "cm")
save_plot_all(p_c6_all, "MSigDB_C6_ALL_dotplot", width = 18, height = 14, units = "cm")

export_enrichment_table(ora_c6_up, "MSigDB_C6_ORA_UP_terms.csv")
export_enrichment_table(ora_c6_down, "MSigDB_C6_ORA_DOWN_terms.csv")
export_enrichment_table(ora_c6_all, "MSigDB_C6_ORA_ALL_terms.csv")
```

## GSEA

```{r}
## ============================================================
## GSEA Reactome — clean ENSEMBL -> ENTREZ ranking
## ============================================================

## 1) Start from one row per Ensembl ID
data_de_gsea <- data_de %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    ensemblID = as.character(ensemblID),
    ensemblID_clean = sub("\\.\\d+$", "", ensemblID)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(ensemblID_clean, .keep_all = TRUE)

## 2) Build ranking score
## Prefer DESeq2 stat if available, otherwise signed adjusted p-value score.
if ("stat" %in% colnames(data_de_gsea) && any(is.finite(data_de_gsea$stat), na.rm = TRUE)) {
  data_de_gsea <- data_de_gsea %>%
    dplyr::mutate(rank_score = stat)
} else {
  data_de_gsea <- data_de_gsea %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      padj_safe = pmax(padj, 1e-300),
      rank_score = sign(log2FoldChange) * -log10(padj_safe)
    )
}

## 3) Map ENSEMBL -> ENTREZ
ensembl_to_entrez <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  organism_db,
  keys = unique(data_de_gsea$ensemblID_clean),
  keytype = "ENSEMBL",
  columns = c("ENSEMBL", "ENTREZID", "SYMBOL", "GENENAME")
) %>%
  tibble::as_tibble() %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(ENTREZID)) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(ENSEMBL, ENTREZID, .keep_all = TRUE)

## 4) If one ENSEMBL maps to several ENTREZ, keep one mapping
## This avoids expanding one DESeq2 statistical unit into several genes.
ensembl_to_entrez_one <- ensembl_to_entrez %>%
  dplyr::group_by(ENSEMBL) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

## 5) Join mapping and build ranked Entrez dataframe
gsea_entrez_df <- data_de_gsea %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    ensembl_to_entrez_one,
    by = c("ensemblID_clean" = "ENSEMBL")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(ENTREZID),
    !is.na(rank_score),
    is.finite(rank_score)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    ensemblID = ensemblID_clean,
    symbol_input = symbol,
    ENTREZID = as.character(ENTREZID),
    SYMBOL_orgdb = SYMBOL,
    GENENAME = GENENAME,
    rank_score = rank_score
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(ENTREZID) %>%
  dplyr::slice_max(order_by = abs(rank_score), n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

## 6) Build named vector for ReactomePA::gsePathway
ranked_entrez <- gsea_entrez_df$rank_score
names(ranked_entrez) <- gsea_entrez_df$ENTREZID
ranked_entrez <- sort(ranked_entrez, decreasing = TRUE)

## 7) Export ranking
readr::write_csv(
  gsea_entrez_df,
  file.path(results_dir, "GSEA_ranked_genes_ENTREZ_clean_ENSEMBL_to_ENTREZ.csv")
)

write.table(
  ranked_entrez,
  file.path(results_dir, "ranks_entrez_clean_ENSEMBL_to_ENTREZ.txt"),
  quote = FALSE,
  sep = "\t"
)

## 8) Quality checks
cat("Number of unique Ensembl in data_de:", dplyr::n_distinct(data_de_gsea$ensemblID_clean), "\n")
cat("Number of Entrez in ranked vector:", length(ranked_entrez), "\n")
cat("Duplicated Entrez in ranked vector:", anyDuplicated(names(ranked_entrez)), "\n")

## 9) Run Reactome GSEA
set.seed(123)

gsea_reactome <- ReactomePA::gsePathway(
  ranked_entrez,
  organism = "human",
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  minGSSize = 5,
  maxGSSize = 500,
  by = "fgsea",
  eps = 0
)

gsea_reactome <- clusterProfiler::setReadable(
  gsea_reactome,
  OrgDb = organism_db,
  keyType = "ENTREZID"
)

reactome_res <- gsea_reactome@result

gsea_reactome_tbl <- tibble::as_tibble(reactome_res) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(NES))

readr::write_csv(
  gsea_reactome_tbl,
  file.path(results_dir, "GSEA_Reactome_full_table_clean_ENSEMBL_to_ENTREZ.csv")
)
```

```{r}
# Export Reactome GSEA tables.
gsea_reactome_sig_tbl <- gsea_reactome_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(p.adjust), p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(NES))

gsea_reactome_top_tbl <- gsea_reactome_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(p.adjust)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(NES)) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    ID, Description, setSize, enrichmentScore, NES,
    pvalue, p.adjust, qvalue, rank, leading_edge, core_enrichment
  )

readr::write_csv(gsea_reactome_tbl, file.path(results_dir, "GSEA_Reactome_full_table.csv"))
readr::write_csv(gsea_reactome_sig_tbl, file.path(results_dir, "GSEA_Reactome_significant_terms.csv"))
readr::write_csv(gsea_reactome_top_tbl, file.path(results_dir, "GSEA_Reactome_compact_table.csv"))
export_enrichment_table(gsea_reactome, "GSEA_Reactome_terms.csv")
```

```{r}
# Dotplot of the top Reactome pathways ranked by absolute NES.
reactome_top <- gsea_reactome_tbl %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(abs(NES))) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 40)

nes_min <- min(reactome_top$NES, na.rm = TRUE)
nes_max <- max(reactome_top$NES, na.rm = TRUE)

p_gsea_reactome_dot <- enrichplot::dotplot(
  gsea_reactome,
  x = "NES",
  showCategory = 10,
  color = "NES",
  size = "setSize"
) +
  ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
  ggplot2::coord_cartesian(xlim = c(nes_min - 0.1, nes_max + 0.1)) +
  ggplot2::ggtitle("Reactome GSEA — top pathways")

save_plot_all(p_gsea_reactome_dot, "GSEA_Reactome_dotplot_top10", width = 10, height = 20, units = "cm")
```

```{r}
# Plot representative pathways with annotations.
reactome_pos_ids <- gsea_reactome_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(NES), NES > 0) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(NES)) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 2) %>%
  dplyr::pull(ID)

reactome_neg_ids <- gsea_reactome_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(NES), NES < 0) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(NES) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 2) %>%
  dplyr::pull(ID)

representative_ids <- c(reactome_pos_ids, reactome_neg_ids)

if (length(representative_ids) > 0) {
  for (i in seq_along(representative_ids)) {
    pathway_id <- representative_ids[i]
    pathway_info <- gsea_reactome_tbl %>%
      dplyr::filter(ID == pathway_id) %>%
      dplyr::slice(1)

    p_gsea_curve <- plot_gsea_curve(gsea_reactome, gsea_reactome_tbl, pathway_id)

    if (!is.null(p_gsea_curve)) {
      file_suffix <- paste0(sprintf("%02d", i), "_", make_safe_filename(pathway_info$Description))

      ggplot2::ggsave(
        filename = file.path(figures_dir, paste0("GSEA_Reactome_curve_", file_suffix, ".svg")),
        plot = p_gsea_curve,
        width = 12,
        height = 10,
        units = "cm"
      )

      ggplot2::ggsave(
        filename = file.path(figures_dir, paste0("GSEA_Reactome_curve_", file_suffix, ".png")),
        plot = p_gsea_curve,
        width = 12,
        height = 10,
        units = "cm",
        dpi = 300,
        bg = "white"
      )

      print(p_gsea_curve)
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
# Overview plot for positively enriched pathways.
reactome_pos <- gsea_reactome_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(NES > 0) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(NES))

if (nrow(reactome_pos) > 0) {
  reactome_pos$Description <- stats::reorder(reactome_pos$Description, reactome_pos$NES)

  p_reactome_pos <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    reactome_pos,
    ggplot2::aes(x = Description, y = NES, color = p.adjust, size = setSize)
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point() +
    ggplot2::coord_flip() +
    ggplot2::scale_color_distiller(type = "seq", direction = -1, palette = "OrRd") +
    ggplot2::theme_classic() +
    ggplot2::theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      panel.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "grey90")
    ) +
    ggplot2::ylab("NES") +
    ggplot2::xlab("") +
    ggplot2::ggtitle("Reactome GSEA — positive NES")

  ggplot2::ggsave(
    filename = file.path(figures_dir, "GSEA_All_Sign_Genes_Reactome_TOP30_ONLY_POSITIVE.svg"),
    plot = p_reactome_pos,
    width = 22,
    height = 13,
    units = "cm"
  )
}
```

```{r}
# Curated SLIT/ROBO selection.
slit_robo_core_ids <- c(
  "R-HSA-376176",   # Signaling by ROBO receptors
  "R-HSA-9010553",  # Regulation of expression of SLITs and ROBOs
  "R-HSA-428542"    # Regulation of commissural axon pathfinding by SLIT and ROBO
)

slit_robo_regex <- paste(
  c("SLIT", "ROBO", "Roundabout", "ROBO-SLIT", "SLIT and ROBO"),
  collapse = "|"
)

slit_robo_tbl <- gsea_reactome_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    ID %in% slit_robo_core_ids |
      grepl(slit_robo_regex, Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  )

if (include_broad_axon_guidance) {
  slit_robo_tbl <- gsea_reactome_tbl %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      ID %in% slit_robo_core_ids |
        grepl(slit_robo_regex, Description, ignore.case = TRUE) |
        grepl("Axon guidance", Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
    )
}

slit_robo_tbl <- slit_robo_tbl %>%
  dplyr::distinct(ID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(NES))

readr::write_csv(
  slit_robo_tbl,
  file.path(results_dir, "GSEA_Reactome_SLIT_ROBO_pathways.csv")
)

slit_robo_tbl
```

```{r}

make_safe_filename <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    stringr::str_replace_all("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_") %>%
    stringr::str_replace_all("^_+|_+$", "")
}

plot_gsea_curve <- function(gsea_obj, result_tbl, pathway_id) {
  pathway_info <- result_tbl %>%
    dplyr::filter(ID == pathway_id) %>%
    dplyr::slice(1)

  stopifnot(nrow(pathway_info) == 1)

  pathway_idx <- match(pathway_id, gsea_obj@result$ID)
  stopifnot(!is.na(pathway_idx))

  enrichplot::gseaplot2(
    gsea_obj,
    geneSetID = pathway_idx,
    title = paste0(
      pathway_info$Description,
      "\nNES = ", round(pathway_info$NES, 3),
      " | padj = ", signif(pathway_info$p.adjust, 3),
      " | set size = ", pathway_info$setSize
    )
  )
}

slit_robo_tbl <- slit_robo_tbl %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(NES), p.adjust, Description)

if (nrow(slit_robo_tbl) > 0) {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(slit_robo_tbl))) {

    pathway_id <- as.character(slit_robo_tbl$ID[i])
    pathway_desc <- as.character(slit_robo_tbl$Description[i])

    p_gsea_slit_robo <- plot_gsea_curve(
      gsea_obj = gsea_reactome,
      result_tbl = gsea_reactome_tbl,
      pathway_id = pathway_id
    )

    file_suffix <- paste0(
      sprintf("%02d", i), "_",
      make_safe_filename(pathway_desc)
    )

    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = file.path(figures_dir, paste0("GSEA_SLIT_ROBO_", file_suffix, ".svg")),
      plot = p_gsea_slit_robo,
      width = 13,
      height = 10,
      units = "cm"
    )

    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = file.path(figures_dir, paste0("GSEA_SLIT_ROBO_", file_suffix, ".png")),
      plot = p_gsea_slit_robo,
      width = 13,
      height = 10,
      units = "cm",
      dpi = 300,
      bg = "white"
    )

    print(p_gsea_slit_robo)
  }
}
```


```{r}
## ============================================================
## Reactome GSEA — TOP 30 positive NES with colored categories
## ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(stringr)
  library(patchwork)
  library(grid)
})

## 1) Build TOP 30 positive pathways

top30 <- gsea_reactome_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(NES), !is.na(p.adjust), NES > 0) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(NES)) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 30) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Description = as.character(Description)
  )

## 2) Category detection functions

detect_translation <- function(x) {
  grepl(
    paste(
      "translation",
      "translational",
      "ribosom",
      "eIF",
      "40S",
      "60S",
      "cotranslational",
      "elongation",
      "termination",
      "scanning",
      "start codon",
      "ternary complex",
      "SRP-dependent",
      "pool of free 40S",
      "GTP hydrolysis and joining of the 60S",
      "rRNA processing",
      "NMD",
      "Metabolism of amino acids",
      sep = "|"
    ),
    x,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )
}

detect_transcription <- function(x) {
  grepl(
    paste(
      "pre[- ]?initiation complex",
      "promoter",
      "enhancer",
      "elongation by RNA pol",
      "capping of pre-mRNA",
      "mRNA capping",
      sep = "|"
    ),
    x,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )
}

detect_virus <- function(x) {
  grepl(
    paste(
      "virus",
      "viral",
      "viruses",
      "infection",
      "infectious",
      "SARS[- ]?CoV",
      "SARS-CoV-1",
      "SARS-CoV-2",
      "Influenza",
      "host interactions",
      "modulates host translation machinery",
      sep = "|"
    ),
    x,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )
}

detect_axon <- function(x) {
  grepl("Axon guidance", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
}

detect_slitrobo <- function(x) {
  grepl("ROBO|SLIT", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
}

## 3) Annotate categories

top30_cat <- top30 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    is_axon        = detect_axon(Description),
    is_virus       = detect_virus(Description),
    is_slitrobo    = detect_slitrobo(Description),
    is_translation = detect_translation(Description),
    is_transcript  = detect_transcription(Description),
    Category = dplyr::case_when(
      is_axon        ~ "Pathway associated with axon guidance",
      is_virus       ~ "Other",
      is_slitrobo    ~ "Pathways associated with Slit-Robo",
      is_translation ~ "Pathways associated with translation",
      is_transcript  ~ "Transcription",
      TRUE           ~ "Other"
    )
  )

## 4) Palette

col_slitrobo <- "#FF0000"
col_transl   <- "#FFD700"
col_transcr  <- "#2E86C1"
col_axon     <- "#8E3563"
col_other    <- "#B0B0B0"

cat_palette <- c(
  "Pathways associated with Slit-Robo" = col_slitrobo,
  "Pathways associated with translation" = col_transl,
  "Pathway associated with axon guidance" = col_axon,
  "Transcription" = col_transcr,
  "Other" = col_other
)

## 5) Optional wrapping for long pathway names
## Increase width if you want fewer line breaks.
## Decrease width if labels are still too long.

top30_cat <- top30_cat %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Description_plot = stringr::str_wrap(Description, width = 60),
    Description_plot = factor(
      Description_plot,
      levels = rev(Description_plot)
    )
  )

## 6) Axis label colors

pathway_colors <- setNames(
  cat_palette[top30_cat$Category],
  top30_cat$Description_plot
)

## 7) Main plot

p_main <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  top30_cat,
  ggplot2::aes(
    x = Description_plot,
    y = NES,
    color = p.adjust
  )
) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  ggplot2::coord_flip() +
  ggplot2::scale_color_distiller(
    type = "seq",
    direction = -1,
    values = c(0, 0.05, 0.8, 1),
    palette = "OrRd",
    name = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_classic() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
    legend.justification = c("left", "top"),
    legend.background = ggplot2::element_rect(
      fill = "grey90",
      linewidth = 0.3
    ),
    legend.key.width = grid::unit(0.8, "lines"),
    legend.key.height = grid::unit(0.25, "lines"),
    legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(
      family = "Arial",
      size = 9
    ),
    legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(
      family = "Arial",
      size = 8
    ),
    panel.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
    axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(
      family = "Arial",
      size = 8.5,
      face = "bold",
      lineheight = 1.25,
      color = pathway_colors[levels(top30_cat$Description_plot)]
    ),
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(
      family = "Arial",
      size = 9
    ),
    axis.title = ggplot2::element_text(
      family = "Arial",
      size = 9
    ),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(8, 8, 8, 8)
  ) +
  ggplot2::ylab("NES") +
  ggplot2::xlab("")

## 8) Category legend plot

legend_cat_df <- top30_cat %>%
  dplyr::distinct(Category) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(factor(Category, levels = names(cat_palette))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Category = factor(Category, levels = names(cat_palette)),
    col = cat_palette[as.character(Category)]
  )

p_cat <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  legend_cat_df,
  ggplot2::aes(
    x = Category,
    y = 1,
    color = Category
  )
) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
    values = cat_palette,
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    ggplot2::aes(label = Category),
    vjust = 1.8,
    family = "Arial",
    size = 9 / 2.845
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_void() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(0, 0, 0, 0)
  )

## 9) Combine plots

final_plot <- p_main / p_cat + patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(12, 1.2))

## 10) Display

final_plot

## 11) Save

ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(figures_dir, "GSEA_TOP30_POS_with_legends_transcription_translation.svg"),
  plot = final_plot,
  width = 22,
  height = 22,
  units = "cm"
)

ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(figures_dir, "GSEA_TOP30_POS_with_legends_transcription_translation.png"),
  plot = final_plot,
  width = 22,
  height = 22,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)
```

## LAST PLOT FOR GSEA (HOPE SO!)

```{r}
## ============================================================
## Reactome GSEA — TOP 30 / TOP 35 positive NES
## Colored pathway labels + readable category legend
## ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(tibble)
  library(patchwork)
  library(grid)
})

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 1) Output directory
## ------------------------------------------------------------

dir.create(figures_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 2) Colors requested by RGB values
## ------------------------------------------------------------

col_axon     <- rgb(91, 45, 142, maxColorValue = 255)    # axon guidance
col_slitrobo <- rgb(204, 15, 0, maxColorValue = 255)     # slit-robo
col_other    <- rgb(136, 136, 136, maxColorValue = 255)  # other
col_transl   <- rgb(166, 125, 11, maxColorValue = 255)   # translation

cat_palette <- c(
  "Axon guidance" = col_axon,
  "SLIT/ROBO"     = col_slitrobo,
  "Translation"   = col_transl,
  "Other"         = col_other
)

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 3) Manual category mapping for the new top 35
## ------------------------------------------------------------

manual_category_map <- c(
  "rRNA processing" = "Translation",
  "Translation" = "Translation",
  "rRNA processing in the nucleus and cytosol" = "Translation",
  "Major pathway of rRNA processing in the nucleolus and cytosol" = "Translation",
  "Metabolism of amino acids and derivatives" = "Translation",

  "Signaling by ROBO receptors" = "SLIT/ROBO",

  "Influenza Viral RNA Transcription and Replication" = "Other",
  "Influenza Infection" = "Other",
  "Cellular response to starvation" = "Other",

  "Regulation of expression of SLITs and ROBOs" = "SLIT/ROBO",

  "Ribosome-associated quality control" = "Translation",
  "Eukaryotic Translation Initiation" = "Translation",
  "Cap-dependent Translation Initiation" = "Translation",
  "SRP-dependent cotranslational protein targeting to membrane" = "Translation",
  "Selenoamino acid metabolism" = "Other",
  "Nonsense-Mediated Decay (NMD)" = "Translation",
  "Nonsense Mediated Decay (NMD) enhanced by the Exon Junction Complex (EJC)" = "Translation",
  "GTP hydrolysis and joining of the 60S ribosomal subunit" = "Translation",
  "L13a-mediated translational silencing of Ceruloplasmin expression" = "Translation",
  "Formation of a pool of free 40S subunits" = "Translation",
  "Response of EIF2AK4 (GCN2) to amino acid deficiency" = "Translation",
  "ZNF598 and the Ribosome-associated Quality Trigger (RQT) complex dissociate a ribosome stalled on a no-go mRNA" = "Translation",
  "PELO:HBS1L and ABCE1 dissociate a ribosome on a non-stop mRNA" = "Translation",
  "Nonsense Mediated Decay (NMD) independent of the Exon Junction Complex (EJC)" = "Translation",
  "Peptide chain elongation" = "Translation",
  "Selenocysteine synthesis" = "Other",

  "Viral mRNA Translation" = "Other",

  "Eukaryotic Translation Termination" = "Translation",
  "Eukaryotic Translation Elongation" = "Translation",

  "SARS-CoV-1 Infection" = "Other",

  "Axon guidance" = "Axon guidance",

  "SARS-CoV-1-host interactions" = "Other",

  "Ribosome Quality Control (RQC) complex extracts and degrades nascent peptide" = "Translation",

  "SARS-CoV-2-host interactions" = "Other",
  "SARS-CoV Infections" = "Other"
)

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 4) Fallback automatic category assignment
## Used only if a pathway is not in manual_category_map
## ------------------------------------------------------------

assign_category <- function(description) {
  category <- unname(manual_category_map[description])

  missing_desc <- description[is.na(category)]

  if (length(missing_desc) > 0) {
    stop(
      paste0(
        "Some pathways are missing from manual_category_map:\n",
        paste(unique(missing_desc), collapse = "\n")
      )
    )
  }

  category
}

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 5) Prepare top N table
## ------------------------------------------------------------

prepare_top_reactome <- function(gsea_tbl, n_top = 30) {
  top_tbl <- gsea_tbl %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(NES), !is.na(p.adjust), NES > 0) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(NES)) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = n_top) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Description = as.character(Description),
      Category = assign_category(Description),
      Category = factor(
        Category,
        levels = c("Translation", "SLIT/ROBO", "Axon guidance", "Other")
      ),
      Description = factor(Description, levels = rev(Description))
    )

  top_tbl
}

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 6) Plot function
## ------------------------------------------------------------

make_reactome_top_plot <- function(top_tbl, n_top = 30, title = NULL) {

  ## Important: colors must follow the factor levels after reversing
  axis_label_colors <- setNames(
    cat_palette[as.character(top_tbl$Category)],
    as.character(top_tbl$Description)
  )

  axis_label_colors <- axis_label_colors[levels(top_tbl$Description)]

  p_main <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    top_tbl,
    ggplot2::aes(
      x = Description,
      y = NES,
      color = p.adjust
    )
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(size = 3.2) +
    ggplot2::coord_flip(clip = "off") +
    ggplot2::scale_color_distiller(
      type = "seq",
      direction = -1,
      values = c(0, 0.05, 0.8, 1),
      palette = "OrRd",
      name = "Adjusted p-value"
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_classic() +
    ggplot2::theme(
      legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
      legend.justification = c("left", "top"),
      legend.background = ggplot2::element_rect(
        fill = "grey90",
        colour = "grey40",
        linewidth = 0.3
      ),
      legend.key.width = grid::unit(1.2, "lines"),
      legend.key.height = grid::unit(0.6, "lines"),
      legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(
        family = "Arial",
        size = 11
      ),
      legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(
        family = "Arial",
        size = 10
      ),

      panel.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "grey90"),

      axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(
        family = "Arial",
        size = 12,
        face = "bold",
        colour = axis_label_colors,
        margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 10)
      ),
      axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(
        family = "Arial",
        size = 11
      ),
      axis.title = ggplot2::element_text(
        family = "Arial",
        size = 12
      ),
      plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(
        family = "Arial",
        size = 15,
        face = "bold",
        hjust = 0.5,
        margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 12)
      ),
      plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(20, 30, 20, 30)
    ) +
    ggplot2::ylab("NES") +
    ggplot2::xlab("")

  if (!is.null(title)) {
    p_main <- p_main + ggplot2::ggtitle(title)
  }

  ## Large readable category legend
  legend_cat_df <- tibble::tibble(
    Category = factor(
      c("Translation", "SLIT/ROBO", "Axon guidance", "Other"),
      levels = c("Translation", "SLIT/ROBO", "Axon guidance", "Other")
    ),
    x = c(0.03, 0.33, 0.62, 0.88),
    y = c(0.50, 0.50, 0.50, 0.50),
    label = c(
      "Translation-related pathways",
      "SLIT/ROBO-related pathways",
      "Axon guidance pathway",
      "Other pathways"
    )
  )

  p_cat <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    legend_cat_df,
    ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y)
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      ggplot2::aes(color = Category),
      size = 6
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_text(
      ggplot2::aes(label = label),
      hjust = 0,
      nudge_x = 0.025,
      family = "Arial",
      size = 13 / 2.845
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
      values = cat_palette,
      guide = "none"
    ) +
    ggplot2::coord_cartesian(
      xlim = c(0, 1.25),
      ylim = c(0, 1),
      clip = "off"
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_void() +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(0, 80, 20, 80)
    )

  final_plot <- p_main / p_cat +
    patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(11, 2.3))

  final_plot
}
## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 7) Build top 30 and top 35
## ------------------------------------------------------------

top30_reactome <- prepare_top_reactome(gsea_reactome_tbl, n_top = 30)
top35_reactome <- prepare_top_reactome(gsea_reactome_tbl, n_top = 35)

## Check mapping before plotting
readr::write_csv(
  top30_reactome %>%
    dplyr::select(ID, Description, NES, p.adjust, setSize, Category),
  file.path(results_dir, "Reactome_GSEA_TOP30_positive_category_mapping.csv")
)

readr::write_csv(
  top35_reactome %>%
    dplyr::select(ID, Description, NES, p.adjust, setSize, Category),
  file.path(results_dir, "Reactome_GSEA_TOP35_positive_category_mapping.csv")
)

print(
  top35_reactome %>%
    dplyr::select(Description, NES, p.adjust, Category)
)

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 8) Make plots
## ------------------------------------------------------------

plot_top30 <- make_reactome_top_plot(
  top30_reactome,
  n_top = 30,
  title = "Reactome GSEA — top 30 positive pathways"
)

plot_top35 <- make_reactome_top_plot(
  top35_reactome,
  n_top = 35,
  title = "Reactome GSEA — top 35 positive pathways"
)

plot_top30
plot_top35

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 9) Save large figures
## ------------------------------------------------------------

ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(figures_dir, "GSEA_TOP30_POS_with_large_legends.svg"),
  plot = plot_top30,
  width = 36,
  height = 28,
  units = "cm"
)

ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(figures_dir, "GSEA_TOP30_POS_with_large_legends.png"),
  plot = plot_top30,
  width = 36,
  height = 28,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(figures_dir, "GSEA_TOP35_POS_with_large_legends.svg"),
  plot = plot_top35,
  width = 38,
  height = 32,
  units = "cm"
)

ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(figures_dir, "GSEA_TOP35_POS_with_large_legends.png"),
  plot = plot_top35,
  width = 38,
  height = 32,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)
```
